nasb.text: But now what are you doing on the road to Egypt, To drink the waters of the Nile? Or what are you doing on the road to Assyria, To drink the waters of the Euphrates?

esv.text: And now what do you gain by going to Egypt to drink the waters of the Nile? Or what do you gain by going to Assyria to drink the waters of the Euphrates?

cnv.text: 現在，你為甚麼要到埃及去， 喝西曷的水呢？ 你為甚麼要到亞述去， 喝幼發拉底河的水呢？

ccb.text: 现在，你去埃及喝尼罗河的水有什么用呢？ 你去亚述喝幼发拉底河的水有什么用呢？
